name: Claim denied after finger smash at job in Boise, what do I do now?
description: Appeal promptly with lawyer; gather medical proof of work injury.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after finger smash at job in Boise, what do I do now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal promptly with lawyer; gather medical proof of work injury.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal the denial within Idaho's timelines (typically 20-60 days depending on stage).[2][3] Gather more evidence like medical records proving work link.[2] Key factors: common denial reasons—late report, unrelated injury; lawyer files appeal properly.[3] Don't sign anything, contact attorney immediately for review/representation on contingency.[2] Many denials overturned with help.
